title: 010b SUITE 702 - H
description:
Suite 702 in the Russian sector of Hotel Moskva in Moscow.
russian, hungarian subtitles
Moments of Execution,
a day of Suffering and Hope,
Time of radical change.
Da Vaz has actually found
"a room with a view of a special kind".

camera: Juri Burak
editing: Sándor Gréczi
piano: Boris Kabakov
directed by Da Vaz
installation "Game of Suffering and Hope" by Ben Jakober
filmed on site in Hotel Moskva, Moscow, 9.November 1998
a handmade Da Vaz production© 1998
